description: Create an interactive GeoGebra visualization of the Normal Distribution for US adult male heights (Mean μ = 175.4 cm, Standard Deviation σ = 7.2 cm) illustrating the Empirical Rule (68-95-99.7). The visualization must include the Normal PDF function, shaded regions under the curve representing ±1σ, ±2σ, and ±3σ, and text annotations for '68%', '95%', and '99.7%'. Save the file as 'normal_empirical_rule.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
